hero.subhead: Hand-shaved döner, charcoal-grilled skewers, and bread off the heat — Mon to Fri on a working corner of Biel/Bienne. Open 08:00 to 20:00.

menu.sectionTitle: Cooked to order, off the spit.
menu.intro: Three working stations — the spit at the front, the charcoal grill behind, and the cold mezze counter for sharing. Most plates leave the counter in under ten minutes.
menu.sampleNotice: Sample menu. Actual dishes, prices, and seasonal items are confirmed at the counter or by phone (032 341 32 41).

categories.title: From the spit
categories.subtitle: Döner · Dürüm
categories.intro: The kitchen's centre of gravity. Spit turns from open to close, meat is cut to order, bread is warmed seconds before it leaves the counter.

items.name: Döner in bread
items.subtitle: yufka · folded
items.description: Shaved kebap in folded yufka with salad, onion, yogurt-garlic sauce.

items.name: Dürüm
items.subtitle: tightly rolled
items.description: Tightly rolled wrap — kebap, salad, paste, onion.

categories.title: From the grill
categories.subtitle: Şiş · Adana · Karışık
categories.intro: Skewers cooked over coals to order. Plated with rice or bulgur, salad, and a thin Turkish flatbread to mop the juices.

items.name: Adana skewer
items.subtitle: hand-minced lamb
items.description: Hand-minced spiced lamb · charcoal-grilled · with rice.

items.name: Karışık ızgara
items.subtitle: mixed grill
items.description: Mixed grill — chicken, lamb, peppers, three sauces. Serves two.

categories.title: Mezze & sides
categories.subtitle: Hummus · salatalar · cacık
categories.intro: Cold dips, side salads, hand-cut fries. For sharing across the table or rounding out a takeaway box. Vegetarian by default.

items.name: Hummus & pita
items.subtitle: chickpea & tahini
items.description: Chickpea purée with tahini and lemon, warm pita strips, olive oil.

items.name: Garden salad
items.subtitle: vegan as it stands
items.description: Tomato, cucumber, parsley, red onion, lemon — vegan as it stands.

items.a: General-Dufour-Strasse 47, 2502 Biel/Bienne. Two minutes' walk from Bahnhof Biel along General-Dufour-Strasse.
Walk-in is enough for the counter. For larger groups, it's quickest to call 032 341 32 41 directly.

items.q: Can I order by phone for pickup?
items.a: Yes — call 032 341 32 41 and your order will wait warm at the counter.
Please call 032 341 32 41 directly to ask whether neighbourhood delivery is possible.

items.q: What payment methods do you accept?
items.a: Payment options may vary — call 032 341 32 41 ahead to confirm TWINT or card before you arrive.

items.q: What languages do you speak at the counter?
items.a: German and Turkish are spoken; for French and English, please ask at the counter.

footer.conceptNotice: Website preview for Alibaba 47 — not yet approved by the owner. Photos shown are samples.
